features.name: multi_line_macro_call_with_whitespace_sensitivity
features.description: Code should include a preprocessor macro definition with multiple arguments and line continuation, invoked across multiple lines with varying indentation that triggers incorrect argument parsing
features.snippet:
`define TESTA(cond, msg, arg1, arg2) \
  $display("HELLO %s %d %d", msg, arg1, arg2)

`TESTA( q_np,
         "some_msg", d_p, RESET_VALUE);
